segments.text: I call out to the Lord for help; pleading with the Lord for mercy.
I pour out my complaints before him; I tell him what's troubling me.
When I'm totally discouraged, you know the direction I should take. But whichever way I go, people set traps for me.
I look to my right for someone to support me—but no one pays me any attention. There's no safe place for me—no one cares about me at all.
I cry out to you, Lord, for help, saying,
You are the one who keeps me safe; you are all I need in life. [^468]
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Please listen to my sad cry, for I'm feeling very low. Please save me from those who are after me, for they're too strong for me.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Release me from my prison so I can praise you for the person you are! Those who live right will gather round me because you have treated me so well.
segments.speaker: Unknown
